reviews.review_description: A good fun game for 2-4 players, and one that could be great with a bit of work. The game is dark, ala most space horror flicks, but with some adjustments you get used to it and really don't notice the darkness. It actually adds to the fun when something jumps out of the dark and lands on you!  If you like Demeo, this game will be a good addition to your gaming selection.

This is a fun game! It's a good time if you have 2-4 fiends that you are looking for something to play for a while. It's a bit of a quest game. Def leans into that classic turn based style, but Scifi dark horror. (crank the brightness to max and it's Def got that fun scarey vibe.) 

Single developer shop. So hope he keeps developing on it. Worth a play!

This game graphics are pretty cool, game is like Demeo. However; it is so bloody dark you can’t see a thing. I feel like that is a huge problem for me. Give the marines headlamps or something. Don’t you want people to see your game. In this current state, and thoughts about their original asking price of this title, was $40 where I’m at. It looks like the work definitely went into this title, but it’s so dark I couldn’t even tell I had to pick my characters. Sadly it’s way too dark to play. So instant refund for me. Sadly as it does look good.

developer_response.body:
We added brightness control in 2.1 and a torchlight on B key
Please use these - if you want to have some more light.
BUT - the game is intended to be dark!
It is part of the strategy to use your characters and THEIR lights to discover the level.
You have all you need to win the game and discover the levels.
We will not spoil the game part with light - it is not a bug - it is intended gameplay. 
More light would kill the intended atmosphere of the game.
How about an aliens movie where you always have daylight?

reviews.review_description: If you LOVE Demeo then you’ll like this. Something different to switch things up. Not sure about the price….kind of high….but if you Love demeo you might be able to justify the price. The game has potential if anything. And yes, it’s dark but the darkness works well with the game.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the nice review. With version 2.0 we added brightness control to the options.

reviews.review_description: Fun game enjoying it. Hopefully add more types of enemies. Keep up good work.

developer_response.body: thanks for the nice review. Currently working on cross platform network play, but also plan to add more content, when the game is a success :-)

reviews.review_description: Dig the game. Its just so dark. You cant enjoy your surroundings. Hard to see enemies at least for myself

developer_response.body:
now added brightness control - and yes the game is intended to be dark
it is part of the atmosphere
imagine an alien movie where you always have daylight
the game gives you all you need (torchlights with each character) to discover the levels

reviews.review_description: Game is awesome just takes a little bit to get used to other that plays great and quite the fun time playing

developer_response.body: thanks for the nice review. We now even added a brightness control to the options ans cross play support :-)
